title: Twilio Phone Number
description: Represents a phone number provisioned on the Twilio platform, including capabilities, configuration, and routing settings.

sid.description: Unique 34-character identifier for the phone number

account_sid.description: SID of the Twilio account that owns the number

friendly_name.description: Human-readable name for the phone number

voice.description: Whether the number supports voice calls

voice_url.description: URL for TwiML instructions when a call is received

voice_method.description: HTTP method for the voice URL

voice_fallback_url.description: Fallback URL if the voice URL fails

voice_caller_id_lookup.description: Whether to look up caller ID for incoming calls

sms_url.description: URL for handling incoming SMS messages

status_callback.description: URL for call status change webhooks

voice_application_sid.description: SID of the TwiML application for voice calls

sms_application_sid.description: SID of the TwiML application for SMS

trunk_sid.description: SID of the SIP trunk associated with this number

address_sid.description: SID of the address associated with the number

identity_sid.description: SID of the identity resource associated with the number

bundle_sid.description: SID of the regulatory compliance bundle

beta.description: Whether the number is a beta (new) number

date_created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the number was provisioned

date_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the number was last updated

uri.description: Relative URI for this phone number resource
